speaker: MATT
raw_text: I know. Every edit that came in was awesome. Yeah, we all went together in Simi Valley for a day and shot, and did wonderful photos, which we actually have wallpaper going up tonight!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hello everyone, and welcome to tonight's episode of Critical Role, where a bunch of us nerdy-ass voice actors sit around and play Dungeons and Dragons, roll dice, and stuff. Tonight is a special episode; it's a special 50th episode. We've made 50 of these! To kick off the evening's festivities before the game, we want to show our first big present to you guys, something we've been working on for about a little over a month. We hope you guys enjoy it. Let's go ahead and have a look at the new full intro for Critical Role. [dramatic music]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And welcome back, guys! (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was fun! We've been silently working on that for a long time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It was so hard to keep secret.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Two hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That sounds better.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm excited and I'm nervous, but I'm excited.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm so glad you could join us, and welcome back, Ashley.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Thanks. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Also tonight we're putting up for the next two weeks on pre-order a brand new set of "How Do You Want To Do This" hoodies, which I'm wearing here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's Alternative Apparel and it's super-duper-super-duper cozy inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Look at that! Look at that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's so softy-puffy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They're super soft.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You could use it as a pillow, you could use it as a hoodie.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You could wear it on a plane.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Where are all the other places they could wear it?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: On a train.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Dinner, you could wear it to dinner.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You could wear it in a boat!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With a goat?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You could put it on a goat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: To Big Lots.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: At work or on the go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Keep this going all night long.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: We're going to do our best to keep it as organized and as expedient as possible so we can get to bed at a decent hour, especially those of us who have like 8:00am call times in the morning. Travis.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Look at that! Look at that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's so softy-puffy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They're super soft.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You could use it as a pillow, you could use it as a hoodie.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You could wear it on a plane.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Where are all the other places they could wear it?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: On a train.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Dinner, you could wear it to dinner.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You could wear it in a boat!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With a goat?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You could put it on a goat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: To Big Lots.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: At work or on the go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Keep this going all night long.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Two hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's this content that you've demanded. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So yeah, these are up on the store, or should be, and will be up for pre-order for the next two weeks. If you want one, get one! Because they're cool. I like them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we all have one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Indeed. All right, next up, Critmas is tonight. So we got that coming up after the show.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just a few packages.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, just a few cartloads

speaker: MATT
raw_text: She's back for ten minutes, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go, that makes sense.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If somebody says they're one thing but really they're just not all that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That makes sense. Quick announcement, an event coming up: a convention on May 26 to 29 in Atlanta called MomoCon. I will be a guest at that, so all you east coast folks around Atlanta come say hello! I have panels, and talks, and autographs to give, and cool artwork you can pick up. So yeah, MomoCon, May 26-29, hope to see you guys there. Me and Marisha are both announced to be guests at the Haven Expo in Mackay, Australia on July 2nd, so all you folks in the outback, you'll want to come hang out with me and Marisha at the beginning of July.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (Australian accent) In the outback!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (accented) Going to get a bloomin' onion?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm so sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure they're really thrilled about that.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. Isn't it? One more thing I want to mention: a really great game called Masquerada; I play the lead character, Cicero Gavar. It's been developed by a great studio named Witching Hour. They put up a Kickstarter today to see if they can make the game as good as it possibly can be-- that final push. As an independent/indie studio and an indie product, they're putting out a phenomenal isometric RPG. Great voice talent that includes Jennifer Hale, Dave Fennoy, it's a great cast. Check it out on Kickstarter if it's something you think you'd be interested in, and possibly helping them polish it and make it phenomenal. So check that out. Anything else you guys want to announce?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's back for ten minutes, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I know a lot of Australians.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You've already offended an entire continent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You and Johnny Depp in the same week, come on. So yeah, hopefully we're looking forward to seeing a bunch of you guys down under at the beginning of July. Let's see, reveal secret Scientology message and ascend to Xenu, that's on the list. We got that one situated.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Who put this one together?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Rat Queens! The next Rat Queens issue coming up. 16, I guess? Issue 16 is the number? Has a series of pages in which all of Vox Machina have a wonderful cameo.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's amazing. We're in a comic book. We did it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Has that not publicly been seen yet, is that not out yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Some pictures have been, but not all of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We have transcended, you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We are fiction now.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's so crazy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: If I recall, you aged close to roughly 20 to 25 years.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh gosh!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He only healed a couple of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought she was the one that he--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He healed me back to my age.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, the aging effect was restored, but only to her. The rest of you are still aged up based on the effect of the lair of the sphinx.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's something we're going to have to Restoration away.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Please, I'm handsome as fuck right now, come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you get aged?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like a fine wine. Yeah, I got aged.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can you do Greater Restoration on a group?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, on an individual each time.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Who is the oldest?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, she was.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was and he healed me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Typically Scanlan is the oldest, but I've been aged the most maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's really fucking old right now. Look at all those wrinkles.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How old are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: His ears are starting to droop!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Everyone taking a short rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If I recall, you aged close to roughly 20 to 25 years.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You look like a fine wine, you just got better with age.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I knew that this was coming, I just thought I had more years until it happened.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: They gray looks great on you, the salt and pepper hair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You should really look at this as a nice peek into the future. It's not bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Would you like to be younger?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Young again?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Would you like to be young again?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's probably a good idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you sure you want to do it, Pike, are you sure?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You could do it tomorrow, could you take care of my sister first, Pike?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes. We need to get you into better order, okay? All right, where we at here?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I don't cast that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Give her the works.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So, we are taking a short rest? I'm going to burn a couple of hit dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shorty rest and then we'll walk.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: For but a moment, you sense a very similar feeling, one that-- it's been really since the battle with K'Varn when all of the light in the world vanished for a second and darkness took your consciousness, and that same cold sensation starts to stem from the blade itself like it's actually trying to pull you into it, and you resist it. And you stand there and look at the blade and it just-- in comparison to its larger form, it looks small. It's the same size it was since you originally got it, but you look at it there in this long, still silence as you try and conjecture what just transpired. And in that silence you hear the voice once again go, "Feed. Now."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. Now it's going to steal his strength.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Eat it, sword.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: For but a moment, you sense a very similar feeling, one that-- it's been really since the battle with K'Varn when all of the light in the world vanished for a second and darkness took your consciousness, and that same cold sensation starts to stem from the blade itself like it's actually trying to pull you into it, and you resist it. And you stand there and look at the blade and it just-- in comparison to its larger form, it looks small. preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Eat it, sword.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Short rest doesn't give you any spells back. What level spells do you have still?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pike is it the sword, is it the sword?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I feel like it's the sword, I mean we all know that sword has been weird.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can you Greater Restoration him?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I'll Greater Restoration on Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: While she does Greater Restoration, I want to go over and--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Break it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't break it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: -- grab the sword and see-- yeah, actually, can I do like a--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't break it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why not?!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: His soul could be inside of it

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean, his soul could be inside of it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I touched the sword, it spoke to me, it craves strength from other beings

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, what do you mean it spoke to you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Here's my question to you, Pike. What spells do you have?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so short rest--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys stop by the Foramere Basin, where you originally saw the encampment of some of the survivors of the Westruun incursion by the Chroma Conclave. As you approach, some of the guards immediately come up, crossbows up, when they notice who it was before previously, they lower their weapons and one of the guards comes forward, approaches you, saying, "Good to see that you've returned. We've managed to also acquire our recently captured individuals, most at least have come back safely, it's appreciated. If you wish to talk to Cornelius, well, he should be up and about. I'll take you." Leads you guys into the camp. As you find your way in, folks around you tend to stop again and watch you quietly as you pass, a few with smiles, and you see a few people wave and say, thank you. And you do see a couple of individuals that you did help escape from the orc encampment, they themselves are still on the mend, a lot of them were fairly brutalized when they were there, but the same child that you found in the tent just runs up and gives a big ol' hug to Vex and holds you for a second, then lets go and runs back off to her mother. You're led back to the tent where Cornelius originally met with you guys, but Cornelius is outside of the tent right now, just in the process of cutting firewood that's going to be used for the firepits later on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, we should probably stop by and tell them that their problem has been handled.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We could stop by later and tell them that both their problems have been handled.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why can't we stop by now? They're right here, we might as well pop in. We'll forget if we don't do it now. I know us. It'll be three months before we come back, and then we'll be like, by the way--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we're coming back soon because we're going into the Feywild.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, they know their problem's been handled because we sent all their people back to them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's just talk to them real fast. Okay. We pop in, we're like, hey.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think Keyleth wants a reward.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys have traveled for one day, you've gone into the evening, you can take a rest here or, you know, rest within your mansion on the outskirts of this encampment before it roots up and starts heading back to Kymal relatively soon. You guys then, the next morning, can continue your trek northward, and you can probably get to Westruun by the end of day, if you travel quickly and consistently.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we need to check in with Drez? No, we know what he wants.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fuck Drez.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That guy's a weasel.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We have his Hunk of Quall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was a gift, I'm pretty sure. It's a loaner, it's on loan for the foreseeable future until we save the world.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Vina. Mr. Drez Vina.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Drez Vina, who is the assistant to Master Quall. Who is the one that originally hired you. And by the fact that he called a debt on the initial enchanted ruby that you used on your first endeavor, yeah, you get the feeling that whatever this object is that he gave you, it's probably on loan.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (coughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Pike! Are you all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Heal her!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you guys continue forward into Westruun?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: To Westruun. And what is our mission?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, what are we, what's our plan here, Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What time is it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys have traveled for one day, you've gone into the evening, you can take a rest here or, you know, rest within your mansion on the outskirts of this encampment before it roots up and starts heading back to Kymal relatively soon. You guys then, the next morning, can continue your trek northward, and you can probably get to Westruun by the end of day, if you travel quickly and consistently.

preceding_turns.text: Drez Vina, who is the assistant to Master Quall. Who is the one that originally hired you. preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, what are we, what's our plan here, Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What time is it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, as you guys leap into the high grass, moving around the outside of Westruun, eyes peeled, as the sun sets and the night kicks in, you try your best to watch for any patrols that are keeping an eye. Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sure?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're keeping a good distance, as we get closer, so it lasts, I cast Pass Without a Trace on us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We have that really nice high grass, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It was like waist-high or so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not like cornstalk high.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There were areas where there was, like during the thick farmland, there are areas where they have high-stalk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to stay there, I'd like to stay in those areas.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you'll be pretty much dodging from farmland to farmland, on the outside. I need you all to roll stealth checks, if you could?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Add ten because I cast Pass Without a Trace.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use, oh no. Because that won't be enough time.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on, Pikey.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's really good. Plus ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Plus ten?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, because I cast Pass Without a Trace on us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We're quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He rolled anyway.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 39, okay. So as you guys wait in the back, staying low to the grass, you watch as Vax dives into the field and vanishes.
